ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the store */,
  "district" TEXT /* District of the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the store */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the store */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES store_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sales occurred */,
  "week_number" INTEGER /* Week number for the sales data */,
  "week_start" TEXT /* Start date of the week */,
  "week_end" TEXT /* End date of the week */,
  "customer_count" INTEGER /* Total number of customers during the week */,
  "gross_margin" REAL /* Gross margin for the week */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue for the week */,
  "average_order_value" REAL /* Average order value for the week */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Sales channel (e.g., online, in-store, phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales detail */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue for the product */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_details_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_details_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales_data ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date as manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "extension" TEXT /* Extension of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity_on_hand" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product currently in stock */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for reorder quantity */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when threshold is reached */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date of last stock update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the supplier */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the supplier */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "module" TEXT /* Module (e.g., sales, inventory, reports) */,
  "read_access" INTEGER /* Read access for the module */,
  "write_access" INTEGER /* Write access for the module */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each sales record
ID of the store where the sales occurred
Week number for the sales data
Total number of customers during the week
Average order value for the week
Unique identifier for each sales detail
Unique identifier for each store manager

Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, analyst)
